case_title: DAVIS, JAMES JR. VS DEPT. OF PARKING & TRAFFIC C/O CITY ATTY.

docket_entries.description: CORRESPONDANCE FROM THE CCSF, OFFICE OF THE CITY ATTORNEY NOTIFYING CORRCT ADDRESS FOR MAILING.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $325.00 FILED BY DAVIS, JAMES JR. AS TO DEFENDANT DEPT. OF PARKING & TRAFFIC C/O CITY ATTY. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-10-1998 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DEPT. OF PARKING & TRAFFIC C/O CITY ATTY.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DAVIS, JAMES JR. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DEPT. OF PARKING & TRAFFIC C/O CITY ATTY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
